properties.name: spring.solr.standalone.host
properties.description: Solr server URL for standalone mode. Must end with /solr for Solr 10+.

properties.name: spring.solr.standalone.default-collection
properties.description: Default Solr collection name for standalone mode. Used for health checks and as the SolrClient default.

properties.name: spring.solr.cloud.zk-host
properties.description: ZooKeeper connection string for SolrCloud mode (e.g. localhost:2181). When set, a CloudSolrClient is created.

properties.name: spring.solr.cloud.default-collection
properties.description: Default Solr collection name for SolrCloud mode. Used for health checks and as the CloudSolrClient default.

properties.name: spring.solr.connection-timeout
properties.description: Connection timeout for the Solr client.

properties.name: spring.solr.request-timeout
properties.description: Request timeout for the Solr client.

properties.name: spring.solr.commit-mode
properties.description: Controls whether SolrTemplate commits after each write operation. NONE relies on Solr's autoCommit; IMMEDIATE forces a hard commit after each write.
